title: Holidays in Beijing 2025-26
details: Highlights: Tiananmen Square, Forbidden City, Great Wall of China, Bird’s Nest Stadium, Water Cube, Temple of Heaven, Wangfujing Night Market, and Universal Studios Beijing. A perfect blend of history, culture, and entertainment.

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA for flight check-in. Flight: CA180 MNL–PEK 06:20–11:05. Arrival at Beijing International Airport. Meet and greet with tour guide, then visit Tiananmen Square and the Forbidden City — the imperial palace of the Ming and Qing Dynasties with over 8,700 rooms. Shopping at Tea Shop. Check in to hotel and rest.

itinerary.day_title: Day 2: Beijing – Great Wall of China Tour (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Breakfast at hotel. Visit the world-famous Great Wall of China — the longest defense structure ever built. Visit Bird’s Nest Olympic Stadium and Water Cube. Continue with shopping tours at the Chinese Medicine Center and Jade Shop. Return to hotel for overnight stay.

Breakfast at hotel, then proceed to Universal Studios Beijing. Entrance, transfer, and tour guide assistance are included. Experience movie-themed attractions and rides in China’s largest Universal park. Return to hotel and overnight stay.

Breakfast at hotel. Visit Temple of Heaven, showcasing traditional Chinese architecture and symbolism. Enjoy free time at Wangfujing Night Market and Jewelry Shop. Transfer to airport for flight back to Manila. Flight: CA179 PEK–MNL 19:05–00:10 (+1). Home sweet home!

inclusions: Roundtrip airline ticket via Air China
Airline tax and Philippine travel tax
3 nights hotel accommodation in a 4★ hotel
Private coach for all tours and transfers
exclusions: Tipping for guide and driver ($20 per trip)
Personal expenses not mentioned in the itinerary
extra_details: Notes: Price per person based on twin/triple sharing. Visa and travel insurance are required for entry to China.
Down Payment: $200 upon reservation. Full payment due 45 days before departure.
